perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up shot of packaged 'Japanese Seafood and Meat Stir-fried Noodles' on a Costco refrigerated shelf; a hand reaches out and lifts one package. (2) The scene cuts to a well-lit indoor dining room where two young women are holding the same large noodle tray; they are smiling and gesturing towards the food. (3) A series of close-ups follows, highlighting individual ingredients like large pink shrimp, scallops, and pieces of chicken being pointed at or picked up with chopsticks. (4) Animated stickers of cartoon characters and icons (like a dancing shrimp and a bun) appear near the food. (5) One woman takes a bite from a smaller plate, showing a delighted facial expression, and then pours Japanese mayonnaise over the noodles from a large bottle.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced background music with a synthesized pop melody starts immediately. A high-pitched, energetic male voiceover begins narrating the product features with rapid speech. (2) As the scene transitions to the two women, their voices join in; they speak in a cheerful, conversational tone, often overlapping with the male narrator. (3) Various cartoonish sound effects (pops, dings, and sparkles) are synchronized with the appearance of text and graphics on the screen. (4) The sounds of chopsticks clicking against a plate and the slight rustle of food packaging are audible during close-up shots. (5) The music volume remains consistent throughout, maintaining a high-energy atmosphere until the final scene.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Costco Wholesale logo with 'Finally bought it after two trips!' (Decorative Hook). (2) 'God-tier Japanese Seafood & Meat Stir-fried Noodles' in large green and white characters (Hook). (3) '1kg for only 394 TWD' (Functional/Informational). (4) '7 large shrimp and many scallops' (Functional/Informational). (5) 'Sauce is LOVE' with flame graphics (Decorative/Effect). (6) 'Secret hack: Japanese Mayonnaise' (Hook). (7) Continuous subtitles at the bottom translating the spoken dialogue into Traditional Chinese.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Store discovery -> Home product showcase -> Detailed ingredient inspection -> Tasting and secret tip.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 female creators appearing together in the home setting.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Two young Asian women; one wears a beige beret and a light-colored top, the other has long dark hair and wears a white off-the-shoulder top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A commercial refrigerator aisle in Costco followed by a modern, clean apartment dining area with warm lighting and a neutral-colored table.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Feature Inventory -> Tasting Feedback -> Hidden Hack
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To generate interest and sales for a specific pre-packaged food item at Costco by highlighting its high ingredient quality, value for money, and personal recommendation from creators.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product, mention of price, positive review, and 'must buy' framing.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Heavy use of variety-show style captions and pop-up cartoon stickers.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses typical 'short-video' editing tropes common in Taiwan/Chinese-speaking regions to maintain high engagement.
